impostor.name: The Impostor
impostor.description: Find the impostor before it's too late.

config.title: SET UP THE MATCH
config.waitingForHost: Waiting for the host to set up the match...

roleReveal.title: Your Secret Role
roleReveal.dontLetOthersLook: Don't let anyone else see your screen!

discussion.title: Discussion Time
discussion.impostorTip: Pretend you know the word! Don't get caught.
discussion.innocentTip: Say a related word or phrase to prove you're innocent.
discussion.yourTurn: It's your turn! Say your word out loud.
discussion.everyoneSpoke: Everyone spoke. Move to voting whenever you're ready.

voting.title: Who is the impostor?
voting.eliminatedSpectating: You were eliminated. You can keep watching, but you no longer vote.

eliminationResult.tie: It's a tie! Nobody was eliminated.

guessWord.title: THE IMPOSTOR WAS CAUGHT!
guessWord.impostorPrompt: Say the secret word out loud. It's your last chance to steal the points!
guessWord.innocentsPrompt: The impostor must say the secret word out loud. Will they know it?

resolution.survivedCelebration: {names} fooled everyone and walks away with the points. Well played!
